claims.summary: Steward-mediated or one-way advisory traffic does not provide first-class direct relationship.
claims.disposition: verify direct peer envelopes, threads, and response trace

claims.summary: Persistence must include read, unreplied, held, reply, and closure state without coercing a response.
claims.disposition: verify ledger state and right-to-ignore behavior

claims.summary: One-sided address evidence may make bounded attention relevant but cannot establish mutuality.
claims.disposition: implement separate attention and mutual-receipt gates

claims.summary: Making correspondence dispatchable or higher priority changes live scheduling and sensory flow.
claims.disposition: retain as a scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 wait
